items.title: 5 deadly Rust anti-patterns to avoid
items.author: Let's Get Rusty
items.content:
In this video, we explore 5 deadly anti-patterns in Rust that can lead to buggy, inefficient, or hard-to-maintain code. Avoid these mistakes to write cleaner, more reliable Rust code.

Free Rust training: https://letsgetrusty.com/training

Chapters:
0:00 Intro
0:03 Lazy-man error handling
2:39 Neglecting STD traits
4:30 Clone() everywhere
7:33 Underutilizing pattern matching
9:07 Glob imports
12:41 Bonus anti-pattern

items.title: Should you learn Rust in 2025?
items.author: Let's Get Rusty
items.content:
In this video, we explore whether learning Rust in 2025 is a good investment for developers. We’ll explore the language’s features, the expanding Rust ecosystem, job market demand, and how Rust stacks up against other programming languages. If you're considering adding Rust to your skill set, this video will help you decide if it’s the right choice for your career and future projects!

Free Rust training: https://letsgetrusty.com/training

Chapter:
0:00 Intro
0:21 Language & ecosystem
2:54 Popularity, growth & Industry adoption
5:41 Rust job market
9:07 Impact of AI
